biography: Mikko, a familiar face from Kurk Golf, is known for his meticulous approach to the game. While some may find his unwavering focus intimidating, those who know him well appreciate his dedication and sharp wit off the course.

Mikko has previously appeared at the Hector Trophée and although the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him so far, his consistent performance ensures he remains a formidable competitor.

While Mikko is not expected to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts are well-aware that the world of golf is full of surprises, and fans will remain vigilant for any updates.
